description: Stage 2 verification steps. ${filter} is a set of pnpm --filter args computed by verify-upgrade.sh: it selects the workspace packages whose package.json changed in the PR PLUS everything that depends on them, so steps never build the whole monorepo. verify-upgrade.sh picks packageOverrides[<dep>] if present, else defaults.

react.description: React touches rendering; run the usual steps plus an integration smoke test.

jest.description: Jest upgrades most often break mocks/timers; run tests first for fast feedback, then build.

typescript.description: TypeScript bumps surface as type errors; type-check first (cheapest signal) before test.
